title: MAINTAINER: stdin_reader skips blank lines silently, no diagnostic
description: In stdin_reader.rs lines 32-33, blank lines are skipped silently with no event. If a user sends a blank line or an integration test sends a malformed command followed by a blank, they get no feedback. In 6 months, debugging a bot hang will be harder if blank-line handling isn't doc'd. Fix: doc comment explaining blank lines are silently skipped (not errors).
